subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come is verily the Manifestation of My Self, the Dawning-Place of My verses and the Orient [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی انه لمظهر نفسی و مطلع آیاتی و مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @high station of the true believer, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
